name: Wallenstam AB (publ)
summary: Wallenstam AB (publ) develops, builds, sells, and manages residential and commercial properties for people and businesses in Gothenburg and Stockholm, Sweden. Its property portfolio comprises approximately 230 properties, including 10,000 apartments and 1,000 commercial tenants. The company also owns and operates 66 wind turbines with a total combined installed output of 143 megawatts; and engages in solar cells modules business. Wallenstam AB (publ) was founded in 1944 and is headquartered in Gothenburg, Sweden.
